description:
# macOS System Tray

Add tray icon, window hide behavior, Cmd+Q intercept, and live agent status to the Electron main process.

## Phases
1. Core Tray + Window Hide Behavior
2. Live Agent Status in Tray
title: [Epic] macOS System Tray
